# West Wing IAA Report

*Generated by `compute_iaa.py`*

## 1. Dataset Summary

- **Designated IAA items** (all 6 annotators): 10
- **Opportunistic overlap items** (2 annotators each): 6
- **Annotators**: claire, evan, galileo, nathan, quinn, shai
- **Combined α** (IAA + opportunistic, ordinal): 0.6510  (n=16 items)

## 2. Power Rating Agreement  *(PRIMARY)*

*Ordinal scale −2 to +2. Core annotation task.*

| Metric                       | Value           | Notes                                           |
| ---------------------------- | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| **Krippendorff α (ordinal)** | 0.6240          | **Primary metric** — ordinal distance weighting |
| Fleiss' κ                    | 0.2167          | Nominal; widely reported in NLP                 |
| Exact agreement              | 10.00%          | All 6 annotators give identical rating          |
| Adjacent agreement (±1)      | 92.00%          | All pairs within one rating step                |
| ICC(2,1)                     | 0.6192          | Two-way mixed, absolute agreement               |
| Mean pairwise wt. κ          | 0.3950 ± 0.1867 | Average over 15 annotator pairs                 |
| Krippendorff α (nominal)     | 0.2298          | Robustness baseline (ignores ordinal structure) |

**No-shift subset** (9 items where majority did not flag a power shift)

| Metric             | Full set | No-shift subset | Δ       |
| ------------------ | -------- | --------------- | ------- |
| α (ordinal)        | 0.6240   | 0.6436          | +0.0196 |
| Fleiss' κ          | 0.2167   | 0.2171          | +0.0003 |

| Adjacent agreement | 92.00%   | 91.11%          | -0.89%  |

## 3. Per-Annotator Quality  *(PRIMARY)*

**WAWA** = Worker Agreement With Aggregate (mean pairwise weighted κ against all others).  
**Bias** = annotator mean − group mean (positive → rates toward B dominance).  
**DS Accuracy** = diagonal mass of Dawid-Skene confusion matrix.

| Annotator | WAWA κ | Bias   | Outlier Rate | DS Accuracy | DS Bias |
| --------- | ------ | ------ | ------------ | ----------- | ------- |
| nathan    | 0.4917 | -0.067 | 0.00%        | 0.7600      | -0.200  |
| galileo   | 0.4433 | -0.167 | 0.00%        | 0.5800      | -0.300  |
| quinn     | 0.4085 | -0.067 | 0.00%        | 0.5600      | -0.200  |
| evan      | 0.4066 | +0.133 | 0.00%        | 0.5000      | +0.000  |
| shai      | 0.3936 | +0.233 | 0.00%        | 0.5200      | +0.100  |
| claire    | 0.2264 | -0.067 | 0.00%        | 0.4000      | -0.200  |

## 9. Interpretation Guide

Standard κ / α benchmarks (Landis & Koch 1977):

| Range       | Interpretation          |
| ----------- | ----------------------- |
| < 0.00      | Poor / less than chance |
| 0.00 – 0.20 | Slight                  |
| 0.21 – 0.40 | Fair                    |
| 0.41 – 0.60 | Moderate                |
| 0.61 – 0.80 | Substantial             |
| 0.81 – 1.00 | Almost perfect          |
